```python
import scanpy as sc
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from scipy import sparse
import anndata as ad

# Set scanpy settings
sc.settings.verbosity = 3
sc.settings.set_figure_params(dpi=80, facecolor='white')

# Load the spatial data
print("Loading spatial transcriptomics data...")
adata = sc.read_h5ad('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/Data/dlpfc/dlpfc.h5ad')
print(f"Spatial data shape: {adata.shape}")

# Load the reference single-cell data
print("Loading reference single-cell data...")
ref_adata = sc.read_h5ad('./dlpfc_reference.h5ad')
print(f"Reference data shape: {ref_adata.shape}")
print(f"Reference obs columns: {ref_adata.obs.columns.tolist()}")

# Check for cell type annotations in reference
cell_type_col = None
for col in ['cell_type', 'celltype', 'cluster', 'annotation', 'labels']:
    if col in ref_adata.obs.columns:
        cell_type_col = col
        break

if cell_type_col is None:
    # If no obvious cell type column, use the first categorical column
    for col in ref_adata.obs.columns:
        if ref_adata.obs[col].dtype.name == 'category':
            cell_type_col = col
            break

print(f"Using cell type column: {cell_type_col}")
print(f"Cell types in reference: {ref_adata.obs[cell_type_col].unique()}")

# Make variable names unique
adata.var_names_make_unique()
ref_adata.var_names_make_unique()

# Find common genes between spatial and reference data
common_genes = adata.var_names.intersection(ref_adata.var_names)
print(f"Number of common genes: {len(common_genes)}")

# Subset both datasets to common genes
adata_subset = adata[:, common_genes].copy()
ref_subset = ref_adata[:, common_genes].copy()

# Normalize and log-transform both datasets
print("Preprocessing spatial data...")
sc.pp.normalize_total(adata_subset, target_sum=1e4)
sc.pp.log1p(adata_subset)

print("Preprocessing reference data...")
sc.pp.normalize_total(ref_subset, target_sum=1e4)
sc.pp.log1p(ref_subset)

# Create cell type signature matrix from reference data
print("Creating cell type signature matrix...")
cell_types = ref_subset.obs[cell_type_col].unique()
signature_matrix = pd.DataFrame(index=common_genes, columns=cell_types)

for cell_type in cell_types:
    mask = ref_subset.obs[cell_type_col] == cell_type
    if mask.sum() > 0:
        # Calculate mean expression for each gene in this cell type
        mean_expr = np.array(ref_subset[mask].X.mean(axis=0)).flatten()
        signature_matrix[cell_type] = mean_expr

signature_matrix = signature_matrix.astype(float)

# Perform deconvolution using Non-negative Least Squares (NNLS)
print("Performing cell type deconvolution...")
from scipy.optimize import nnls

# Get spatial data matrix
X_spatial = adata_subset.X
if sparse.issparse(X_spatial):
    X_spatial = X_spatial.toarray()

# Initialize results matrix
n_spots = adata_subset.n_obs
n_cell_types = len(cell_types)
proportions = np.zeros((n_spots, n_cell_types))

# Perform NNLS for each spot
for i in range(n_spots):
    spot_expr = X_spatial[i, :]
    try:
        prop, residual = nnls(signature_matrix.values, spot_expr)
        # Normalize proportions to sum to 1
        if prop.sum() > 0:
            prop = prop / prop.sum()
        proportions[i, :] = prop
    except:
        # If NNLS fails, set to uniform distribution
        proportions[i, :] = 1.0 / n_cell_types
    
    if (i + 1) % 500 == 0:
        print(f"Processed {i + 1}/{n_spots} spots")

# Add cell type proportions to adata.obs
for j, cell_type in enumerate(cell_types):
    col_name = f"prop_{cell_type}"
    adata.obs[col_name] = proportions[:, j]

# Calculate dominant cell type for each spot
dominant_cell_type = []
for i in range(n_spots):
    max_idx = np.argmax(proportions[i, :])
    dominant_cell_type.append(cell_types[max_idx])

adata.obs['dominant_cell_type'] = pd.Categorical(dominant_cell_type)

# Add deconvolution metadata
adata.uns['deconvolution'] = {
    'method': 'NNLS',
    'reference_dataset': './dlpfc_reference.h5ad',
    'cell_type_column': cell_type_col,
    'n_common_genes': len(common_genes),
    'cell_types': cell_types.tolist()
}

# Save results
print("Saving results...")
adata.write('/Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q17/run_0/output.h5ad')

# Print summary
print("\n" + "="*60)
print("CELL TYPE DECONVOLUTION SUMMARY")
print("="*60)
print(f"Method: Non-negative Least Squares (NNLS)")
print(f"Reference dataset: ./dlpfc_reference.h5ad")
print(f"Reference cell type column: {cell_type_col}")
print(f"Number of spots: {adata.n_obs}")
print(f"Number of genes used: {len(common_genes)}")
print(f"Number of cell types: {len(cell_types)}")
print(f"\nCell types identified:")
for cell_type in cell_types:
    print(f"  - {cell_type}")

print(f"\nCell type proportion columns added to adata.obs:")
prop_cols = [col for col in adata.obs.columns if col.startswith('prop_')]
for col in prop_cols:
    mean_prop = adata.obs[col].mean()
    print(f"  - {col}: mean = {mean_prop:.4f}")

print(f"\nDominant cell type distribution:")
dominant_counts = adata.obs['dominant_cell_type'].value_counts()
for cell_type, count in dominant_counts.items():
    percentage = (count / adata.n_obs) * 100
    print(f"  - {cell_type}: {count} spots ({percentage:.1f}%)")

print(f"\nResults saved to: /Users/vvv/Code/Claude-project/STAT-agent/paper/benchmarking/comparison/results/A_vanilla/Q17/run_0/output.h5ad")
print("="*60)
```
